event: Abandoned robotic machine in a desolate landscape
description: A large mechanical robot or drone with an insect-like form stands in a foggy, desolate field. The machine has multiple articulated legs, a cylindrical body with a circular opening, and a pointed red-brown dorsal fin or blade. Dead grass and dried weeds surround its base. Bare, leafless trees fade into thick mist in the background. The overall atmosphere is cold, gray, and post-apocalyptic.
